V0050_01_00_00_0.text: The Orichalcos will do away with all the evil in the world!

V0050_01_00_01_0.text:
Alister's the name!
One of the leaders of Doma!

V0050_01_00_02_0.text: Master Dartz wants your soul, so I will get it for him.

V0050_01_00_03_0.text: What my brother experienced - you'll face twice as worse!

V0050_01_00_04_0.text: When you lose, your soul will be locked away for eternity!

V0050_01_00_05_1.text: There's no one I despise more than you, Kaiba!

V0050_01_00_06_0.text: I've been waiting for this day for years, Kaiba...

V0050_01_00_06_1.text: You'll pay for your crimes with your soul!

V0050_01_00_07_0.text: I represent everyone who was destroyed by your company.

V0050_01_00_07_1.text: I'll make sure you can never step on anyone again!

V0050_01_00_08_0.text: My sole purpose in life is to get vengeance for Mikey!

V0050_01_00_09_0.text: You better not get upset if I capture your soul.

V0050_01_00_10_0.text:
Master Dartz...
If this is what you want...

V0050_03_00_00_0.text:
I will eliminate all the wicked!
Starting with you!

V0050_03_00_01_0.text:
Heh.
Even your own cards don't love you.

V0050_03_00_03_0.text: If you won't give me your soul, I'll just take it from you!

V0050_03_00_04_0.text:
Impressive.
But I'm not finished with you yet!

V0050_03_00_05_0.text: I will rebuild the world into the paradise it once was!

V0050_05_00_00_0.text: You might want to start saying your goodbyes!

V0050_07_09_01_0.text: I activate the card I Set!

V0050_08_00_00_0.text:
Heh...
I activate The Seal of Orichalcos!

V0050_08_00_00_1.text: Only the winner of this Duel can leave this Seal!

V0050_08_00_01_0.text: I activate The Seal of Orichalcos!

V0050_08_00_01_1.text: The Orichalcos will draw out the darkness within you!

V0050_08_00_02_0.text: I activate The Seal of Orichalcos!

V0050_08_00_02_1.text: You'll suffer even worse than my brother did!

V0050_08_00_03_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Pot of Greed!

V0050_08_00_04_0.text: I activate the Quick-Play Spell, Emergency Provisions!

V0050_08_00_05_0.text:
I'll activate my Continuous Trap!
Royal Decree!

V0050_08_00_06_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Machina Redeployment!

V0050_08_00_07_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Spell!
Machina Defense Perimeter!

V0050_08_00_09_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Unauthorized Reactivation!

V0050_08_00_10_0.text: I activate the Continuous Spell, Machina Armored Unit!

V0050_08_00_11_0.text: I activate Machina Armored Unit's effect!

V0050_08_00_12_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Machina Overdrive!

V0050_08_00_13_0.text: I activate Machina Overdrive from the Graveyard!

V0050_09_00_00_0.text: Air Fortress Ziggurat activates its effect!

V0050_09_00_04_0.text: I activate Hydralander Orbit's effect from my Graveyard!

V0050_09_00_06_0.text: Machina Ruinforce activates its effect when it's destroyed!

V0050_09_00_09_0.text: Machina Citadel's effect activates from the Graveyard!

V0050_09_00_11_0.text: Machina Irradiator's effect activates from my hand!

V0050_09_00_14_0.text: Machina Megaform activates its effect from my Graveyard!

V0050_09_00_15_0.text: Machina Air Raider's effect activates from my hand!

V0050_09_00_16_0.text: Machina Air Raider activates its effect!

V0050_09_00_17_0.text: Machina Fortress activates its effect when it's destroyed!

V0050_09_00_18_0.text: Machina Gearframe activates its effect when it's Summoned!

V0050_09_00_20_0.text: Machina Soldier's effect activates when it's Summoned!

V0050_09_00_22_0.text: Machina Unclaspare activates when it's added to the hand!

V0050_09_00_23_0.text: Machina Unclaspare's effect activates when it's Summoned!

V0050_09_00_24_0.text: Machina Possesstorage's effect activates when it's Summoned!

V0050_09_00_27_0.text: Machina Resavenger's effect activates from my Graveyard!

V0050_09_00_29_0.text: I activate Unauthorized Bootup Device's effect!

V0050_09_00_30_0.text: Unauthorized Bootup Device activates when it's destroyed!

V0050_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Defense Position!

V0050_13_00_00_0.text: Behold the most destructive war machine ever created!

V0050_16_00_00_0.text:
Your defeat is at hand!
Your soul belongs to me!

V0050_16_00_01_0.text: This is the perfect monster to finish you with!

V0050_21_00_00_0.text: Nothing you do can possibly save you now!

V0050_21_00_01_0.text: Your next draw will be the final one of your existence!

V0050_21_00_04_0.text: When will you realize everything you do is pointless!

V0050_28_00_00_0.text: This planet is full of nothing but hatred and greed.

V0050_28_00_00_1.text: So the best thing to do is simply start over!

V0050_28_00_01_0.text: Everything I do is to save humanity!

V0050_28_00_02_0.text: This is only a smidgen of the pain that I felt!

V0050_28_00_03_0.text: Time to feed your soul to the Great Beast!

V0050_28_00_04_0.text: I know every detail of your life, including your tactics!

V0050_28_00_05_0.text: All your money won't even buy a shred of my respect!

V0050_28_00_06_0.text: Building KaibaLands won't make up for the misery you caused!

V0050_28_00_07_0.text:
You're nothing but a heartless tyrant! 
Just like Gozaburo!

V0050_28_00_08_0.text: It seems our mission is too difficult for you to carry out.

V0050_28_00_09_0.text:
This was unexpected...
Is something troubling you, Master?

V0050_29_00_00_0.text:
This isn't over!
I'll be back for my revenge!

V0050_29_00_01_0.text: You're the one person I didn't want to lose to!

V0050_29_00_03_0.text:
Do you think you can end every war on this planet?
Prove it!

V0050_29_00_04_0.text: Since people like you exist, the whole world will crumble!

V0050_29_00_05_0.text:
Stop lecturing me!
It's your fault that my brother is gone!

V0050_30_00_00_0.text: Learn the ways of the world!

V0050_30_00_01_0.text: With the power of Doma, all this is simple to do!

V0050_30_00_02_0.text: This is no illusion. This is reality!

V0050_32_00_01_0.text:
Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Links!
...KaibaCorp created this app!?
Grr! Kaibaaaa!

V0050_33_00_00_0.text:
Your soul belongs to me.
You just don't know it yet!

V0050_33_00_01_0.text: You don't have the skills to defeat me!

V0050_34_00_00_0.text: I'll use this monster to get my revenge!

V0050_34_00_01_0.text: Every moment brings us closer to the end.

V0050_34_00_02_0.text: How are you expecting to win this Duel?

V0050_34_00_03_0.text: If you think you can pull it off, show me!

V0050_34_00_04_0.text: It was KaibaCorp that took my brother away from me!

V0050_34_00_05_0.text: Everyone has the same lust for power that drove Gozaburo.

V0050_34_00_06_0.text: Since everyone is corrupt, it's time to rebuild the world.

V0050_34_00_07_0.text: I've waited for this day for a long time, Kaiba Boy!

V0050_34_00_08_0.text:
No, I'm not Pegasus.
But pretty good imitation, right?

V0050_34_00_09_0.text:
Fasten your seatbelts.
We may be experiencing turbulence.

V0050_35_00_01_0.text: The light of the Orichalcos will purify this disgusting world!

V0050_36_00_02_0.text: This is our last shot at victory!

V0050_36_00_06_0.text: Master Dartz, their souls will soon belong to you!
